THE PROVENANCE SHELF — third-party notices for the Vault100 parcels
(web counter · CLI engine · desktop box · pocket annex APK)
=====================================================================

Vault100 itself is MIT-licensed (Copyright (c) 2026 BlazeNXT); see LICENSE at
the repository root. This file carries the notices of the components the
bureau's parcels ship or are built with. The counter embeds NO fonts (system
type stacks only), loads NO third-party scripts at runtime beyond the
vendored files below, and phones home to NOBODY.

---------------------------------------------------------------------
1) libsodium — vendored as web/vendor/libsodium-sumo.js + libsodium-wrappers.js
   (WASM/asm.js build; all encryption, signatures and randomness)
   ISC License — Copyright (c) 2013-2026 Frank Denis <j at pureftpd dot org>

   Permission to use, copy, modify, and/or distribute this software for any
   purpose with or without fee is hereby granted, provided that the above
   copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies.

   THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND THE AUTHOR DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES
   WITH REGARD TO THIS SOFTWARE INCLUDING ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF
   MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHOR BE LIABLE FOR
   ANY SPECIAL, DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OR ANY DAMAGES
   WHATSOEVER RESULTING FROM LOSS OF USE, DATA OR PROFITS, WHETHER IN AN
   ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, ARISING OUT OF
   OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.

   Upstream: https://github.com/jedisct1/libsodium
           and https://github.com/jedisct1/libsodium.js

---------------------------------------------------------------------
2) Argon2 — vendored as web/vendor/argon2.js + web/vendor/argon2.wasm
   (the KDF that prices every key-turning notch)

   The Argon2 reference implementation (P-H-C) is dual-licensed under your
   choice of Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal or the Apache License 2.0:
     https://github.com/P-H-C/phc-winner-argon2/blob/master/LICENSE

   The WebAssembly bindings/dist build conventions derive from argon2-browser
   (antelle/argon2-browser), MIT License:
     https://github.com/antelle/argon2-browser/blob/master/LICENSE.md

   MIT License

   Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a
   copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"),
   to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation
   the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense,
   and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the
   Software is furnished to do so, subject to inclusion of the above notice.

---------------------------------------------------------------------
3) qrcode-generator 1.4.4 — vendored as web/vendor/qrcode.js
   (the courier's QR stamps; the notice also rides at the file's head)

   MIT License — Copyright (c) 2009 Kazuhiko Arase

   Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a
   copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"),
   to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation
   the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense,
   and/or sell copies of the Software, and to permit persons to whom the
   Software is furnished to do so, subject to the following conditions:

   The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included in
   all copies or substantial portions of the Software.

   THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND.

   Upstream: https://github.com/kazuhikoarase/qrcode-generator

---------------------------------------------------------------------
4) Android SDK Platform & Build-Tools (aapt2 · d8 · apksigner · android.jar)
   (used strictly at BUILD time to assemble and seal the pocket annex APK;
    no part of them phones anywhere at runtime — the app requests zero
    permissions)
   Apache License, Version 2.0 — https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
   Copyright © the Android Open Source Project.

---------------------------------------------------------------------

Seals, icons, cover art and all bureau ledger artwork are the bureau's own
work under the MIT license. Bureau type is your own system's — no foundry was
commissioned, so none is owed.

entered into the ledger with release v2.0.26 — "the writ desk".
